name: LiteLLM Proxy
description: Registers a local LiteLLM Proxy OpenAI-compatible server as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback loopback LiteLLM Proxy OpenAI-compatible base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:4000/v1.
Optional fallback LiteLLM bearer token or virtual key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional fallback LiteLLM virtual key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting or LITELLM_API_KEY is configured.
Optional fallback LiteLLM master key used for local proxy inference when no api_key Plugin Setting, LITELLM_API_KEY, or LITELLM_VIRTUAL_KEY is configured.
Optional comma-separated LiteLLM model IDs exposed by the local proxy when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: LiteLLM Proxy base URL
settings.description: Loopback OpenAI-compatible base URL for LiteLLM Proxy. Defaults to http://localhost:4000/v1 and is restricted by the plugin to localhost, 127.0.0.1, or ::1 /v1 URLs.

settings.label: LiteLLM API key
settings.description: Optional LiteLLM bearer token, virtual key, or local master key. Falls back to LITELLM_API_KEY, LITELLM_VIRTUAL_KEY, and then LITELLM_MASTER_KEY.

settings.label: LiteLLM model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the local LiteLLM Proxy. Use IDs returned by /v1/models or model_name values from the proxy config. Falls back to comma-separated LITELLM_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: LiteLLM Proxy
providers.description: Registers configured local LiteLLM Proxy OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
